ALCHEMIST-ACCLIMATE.description: At the start of your turn, if you have more than 3 [gold]Poison[/gold], gain {plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ACCLIMATE.title: Acclimate
ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.description: At the start of your turn, gain {plating:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.title: Accretion
ALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Hits an additional time for each time you've taken [gold]Poison[/gold] damage this combat.
ALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.title: Accrue
ALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.description: Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Dross+[/green]|[gold]Dross[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-ADULTERATE.title: Adulterate
ALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.description:
Lose all [gold]Poison[/gold].
Gain that much [gold]Regen[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Citrinitas+[/green]|[gold]Citrinitas[/gold]} into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.title: Albedo
ALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Triple|Double} the [gold]Poison[/gold], [gold]Regen[/gold] and [gold]Plating[/gold] on ALL enemies and players.
ALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.title: Amplification
ALCHEMIST-ASSAY.title: Assay
ALCHEMIST-ASSIMILATE.title: Assimilate
ALCHEMIST-AUREATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Dross[/gold], [gold]Effluvium[/gold] and [gold]Distillate[/gold] into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-AUREATE.title: Aureate
ALCHEMIST-AUGUR.title: Augur
ALCHEMIST-BIDE.title: Bide
ALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Toxic[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
ALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
ALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Trigger [gold]Poison[/gold] on the enemy.
ALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.title: Catalyse
ALCHEMIST-CATHARSIS.title: Catharsis
ALCHEMIST-CHORUS.description: Allies deal double damage against [gold]Poisoned[/gold] enemies for {turns:diff()} {turns:plural:turn|turns}.
ALCHEMIST-CHORUS.title: Chorus
ALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA.description: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, gain {gold:diff()} Gold.
ALCHEMIST-CHRYSOPOEIA.title: Chrysopoeia
ALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal that much damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Rubedo+[/green]|[gold]Rubedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.title: Citrinitas
ALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Hits two additional times if you applied [gold]Poison[/gold] this turn.
ALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.title: Compound
ALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.title: Congeal
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.description: At the start of your turn, if you have both [gold]Poison[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}{IfUpgraded:show: and draw 1 card|}.
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.title: Conjunction
ALCHEMIST-CORNERED.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If your HP is below 50%, deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ALCHEMIST-CORNERED.title: Cornered
ALCHEMIST-CORRODE.title: Corrode
ALCHEMIST-DECANT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Create a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]} in your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-DECANT.title: Decant
ALCHEMIST-DECOCTION.title: Decoction
ALCHEMIST-DEFEND_ALCHEMIST.title: Defend
ALCHEMIST-DELUGE.description:
Apply X [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Double X if it's 4 or more.
ALCHEMIST-DELUGE.title: Deluge
ALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses 6 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
ALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.title: Deplete
ALCHEMIST-DETONATION.description: Whenever you create a card, deal {damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-DETONATION.title: Detonation
ALCHEMIST-DISTILLATE.title: Distillate
ALCHEMIST-DROSS.title: Dross
ALCHEMIST-EFFLUVIUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-EFFLUVIUM.title: Effluvium
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[green]Procure a random potion.[/green]
|}At the start of your turn, procure a random potion.
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.title: Elixir
ALCHEMIST-EMANATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-EMANATE.title: Emanate
ALCHEMIST-EMERGENCE.description:
Choose a card in your Exhaust Pile.
Return it to your Hand{IfUpgraded:show: upgraded|}.
ALCHEMIST-EMERGENCE.title: Emergence
ALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
ALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Transform a card in your Hand into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
ALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each debuff on the enemy.
ALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.title: Exploit
ALCHEMIST-EXUDE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Regen[/gold]|}.
ALCHEMIST-EXUDE.title: Exude
ALCHEMIST-FALTER.title: Falter
ALCHEMIST-FESTER.description: Poison is triggered against the enemy {triggers:diff()} additional {triggers:plural:time|times} next turn.
ALCHEMIST-FESTER.title: Fester
ALCHEMIST-FLUSH.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Draw that many cards{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
ALCHEMIST-FLUSH.title: Flush
ALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.title: Fumigate
ALCHEMIST-GLEAN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your Draw Pile and add it to your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-GLEAN.title: Glean
ALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.description:
Lose HP equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal {IfUpgraded:show:triple|double} that much damage.
ALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.title: Haemorrhage
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If Fatal, gain {rewards:diff()} additional Potion {rewards:plural:reward|rewards}.
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST.title: Harvest
ALCHEMIST-HONE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Upgrade ALL cards in your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-HONE.title: Hone
ALCHEMIST-HORMESIS.title: Hormesis
ALCHEMIST-ICHOR.description: Deal damage equal to your missing HP.
ALCHEMIST-ICHOR.title: Ichor
ALCHEMIST-IMMOLATION.description: Transform any number of cards in your Hand into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Effluviums+[/green]|[gold]Effluviums[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
ALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play a random Skill from your Discard Pile.
ALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT.title: Inducement
ALCHEMIST-INOCULATE.title: Inoculate
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION.description: Whenever you are healed, deal that much damage to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION.title: Inversion
ALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
ALCHEMIST-LEADEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Dross[/gold] into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-LEADEN.title: Leaden
ALCHEMIST-LIBATION.description:
Consume all your Potions.
For each consumed, gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-LIBATION.title: Libation
ALCHEMIST-MATERIALISE.description: Whenever you create a card, gain {blockGain:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-MATERIALISE.title: Materialise
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.description: Whenever you create a card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.title: Mercurial Form
ALCHEMIST-METABOLISE.description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+2|}.
ALCHEMIST-METABOLISE.title: Metabolise
ALCHEMIST-MIASMA.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
ALCHEMIST-MIASMA.title: Miasma
ALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each debuff you have.
ALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.title: Mortify
ALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and players.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Albedo+[/green]|[gold]Albedo[/gold]} into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.title: Nigredo
ALCHEMIST-OSMOSIS.title: Osmosis
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]Regen[/gold] lost.
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
ALCHEMIST-PARTITION.description: Deal {totalDamage:diff()} damage divided among ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-PARTITION.title: Partition
ALCHEMIST-PERMEATE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, apply {poisonPerBlock:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-PERMEATE.title: Permeate
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain {amount:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {amount:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.title: Philtre
ALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hits an additional time for each potion you've used this combat.
ALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.title: Potentiate
ALCHEMIST-POULTICE.description:
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
ALCHEMIST-POULTICE.title: Poultice
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you use a potion, procure another potion of that type.
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.title: Precipitate
ALCHEMIST-PUNCTURE.title: Puncture
ALCHEMIST-REAGENT.description: Whenever you use a potion while this card is in hand, gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw 1 card.
ALCHEMIST-REAGENT.title: Reagent
ALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.title: Reconstitute
ALCHEMIST-RECTIFY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Regen[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-RECTIFY.title: Rectify
ALCHEMIST-REINFORCE.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each debuff you have.
ALCHEMIST-REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for each {hpThreshold:diff()} HP you are missing.
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.title: Resolve
ALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.description:
Gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Upgrade a card in your Hand.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Nigredo+[/green]|[gold]Nigredo[/gold]} into your Hand.
ALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.title: Rubedo
ALCHEMIST-SALVAGE.description: Choose 2 cards in your Discard Pile to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillates+[/green]|[gold]Distillates[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-SALVAGE.title: Salvage
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION.description: When hit by an attack, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to the attacker.
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION.title: Secretion
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT.title: Sediment
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.description: Poisoned enemies take an additional {percent:diff()}% damage.
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.title: Sepsis
ALCHEMIST-SHED_SKIN.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Lose all [gold]Plating[/gold].
Deals additional damage equal to double your [gold]Plating[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SHED_SKIN.title: Shed Skin
ALCHEMIST-SIPHON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw a card for each debuff you have.
ALCHEMIST-SIPHON.title: Siphon
ALCHEMIST-SPATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {hits:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your Discard Pile.
ALCHEMIST-SPATTER.title: Spatter
ALCHEMIST-STEEP.title: Steep
ALCHEMIST-STRIKE_ALCHEMIST.title: Strike
ALCHEMIST-TEMPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your Hand to [gold]Transform[/gold] into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-TEMPER.title: Temper
ALCHEMIST-TINGE.title: Tinge
ALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:twice |}that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
ALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.description:
Allies gain {regen:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Remove [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Frail[/gold] from Allies.
ALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.title: Suffuse
ALCHEMIST-TRIA_PRIMA.description:
Apply X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Plating[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-TRIA_PRIMA.title: Tria Prima
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional {extraPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.title: Virulence
ALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY.description: The first time your HP changes each turn, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-VOLATILITY.title: Volatility
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.description: Whenever you Procure a potion during combat, draw {draw:diff()} {draw:plural:card|cards} and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.title: Windfall
